title: Greek Gods Timeline
description: An interactive history timeline exploring the lineage and myths of the Greek gods.
overview: A visually driven, interactive timeline that chronicles the Greek pantheon — from primordial deities to the Olympians. Users can scroll through eras, click on gods to read myths, and explore family relationships through a dynamic graph.
features: Clickable god profiles with myth summaries

title: Real-Time Chat App
description: A real-time chat application with rooms, presence indicators, and instant messaging.
overview: A WebSocket-powered chat application where users can create or join named rooms and exchange messages in real time. Includes live presence indicators showing who is currently online, message history, and a clean, minimal interface.

title: Ray Tracer in Rust
description: A CPU ray tracer written from scratch in Rust, rendering scenes with reflections and shadows.
overview: A physically based ray tracer built from the ground up in Rust, following core computer graphics principles. Renders 3D scenes with configurable lighting, materials, reflections, and soft shadows. Outputs high-resolution PNG images and leverages Rust's concurrency for multi-threaded rendering performance.
